data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the insurance requirement verification.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the insurance requirement verification, but the evidence provided does not explicitly confirm whether this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions that an insurance certificate is required two weeks before the event, but there are no concrete API reads or persisted state checks provided to confirm that this requirement is enforced or validated in the system. Therefore, the evidence is inconclusive regarding the coverage of this requirement.
gaps: No explicit confirmation of insurance requirement verification process.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the insurance requirement verification.
